records.question: Which tourist attractions are galleries where you can get there by walking?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id FROM tourist_attractions
JOIN ref_attraction_types ON tourist_attractions.attraction_type_code = ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_code
JOIN tourist_attraction_features ON tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id = tourist_attraction_features.tourist_attraction_id
WHERE ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_description = 'gallery' AND tourist_attractions.how_to_get_there = 'walk'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID
FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1
JOIN Ref_Attraction_Types AS T2 ON T1.Attraction_Type_Code = T2.Attraction_Type_Code
WHERE T2.Attraction_Type_Description = 'Gallery' AND T1.How_to_Get_There = 'Walking'

records.question: Which tourist attractions are galleries accessible by bus that have a photo named game2 with filename 762?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id FROM tourist_attractions
JOIN ref_attraction_types ON tourist_attractions.attraction_type_code = ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_code
JOIN photos ON tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id = photos.tourist_attraction_id
WHERE photos.filename = '762' AND ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_description = 'gallery' AND photos.name = 'game2' AND tourist_attractions.how_to_get_there = 'bus'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT ta.Tourist_Attraction_ID
FROM Tourist_Attractions ta
JOIN Photos p ON ta.Tourist_Attraction_ID = p.Tourist_Attraction_ID
JOIN Ref_Attraction_Types rat ON ta.Attraction_Type_Code = rat.Attraction_Type_Code
WHERE p.Name = 'game2'
  AND p.Filename = '762'
  AND ta.How_to_Get_There LIKE '%bus%'
  AND rat.Attraction_Type_Description LIKE '%gallery%'

records.question: Which tourist attractions named flying elephant can be reached by shuttle at the Film Festival location with address 770 Edd Lane Apt. 098 and have a photo named din1 where the filename is 259?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id FROM tourist_attractions
JOIN locations ON tourist_attractions.location_id = locations.location_id
JOIN photos ON tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id = photos.tourist_attraction_id
WHERE photos.filename = '259' AND locations.location_name = 'Film Festival' AND tourist_attractions.how_to_get_there = 'shuttle' AND photos.name = 'din1' AND tourist_attractions.name = 'flying elephant' AND locations.address = '770 Edd Lane Apt. 098'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT ta.Tourist_Attraction_ID
FROM Tourist_Attractions ta
JOIN Locations l ON ta.Location_ID = l.Location_ID
JOIN Photos p ON ta.Tourist_Attraction_ID = p.Tourist_Attraction_ID
WHERE ta.Name = 'Flying Elephant'
  AND l.Location_Name = 'Film Festival'
  AND l.Address = '770 Edd Lane Apt. 098'
  AND ta.How_to_Get_There = 'Shuttle'
  AND p.Name = 'din1'
  AND p.Filename = '259'

records.question: Which tourist attraction named impressions de France can be reached by bus, is located at The Barnstormer with address 3374 Sarina Manor, and has a photo named game1 with filename 702?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id FROM tourist_attractions
JOIN locations ON tourist_attractions.location_id = locations.location_id
JOIN photos ON tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id = photos.tourist_attraction_id
WHERE tourist_attractions.how_to_get_there = 'bus' AND photos.name = 'game1' AND photos.filename = '702' AND locations.location_name = 'The Barnstormer' AND locations.address = '3374 Sarina Manor' AND tourist_attractions.name = 'impressions de France'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT 
    Tourist_Attractions.Tourist_Attraction_ID
FROM 
    Tourist_Attractions
INNER JOIN 
    Locations ON Tourist_Attractions.Location_ID = Locations.Location_ID
INNER JOIN 
    Photos ON Tourist_Attractions.Tourist_Attraction_ID = Photos.Tourist_Attraction_ID
WHERE 
    Tourist_Attractions.Name = 'impressions de France'
    AND Locations.Location_Name = 'The Barnstormer'
    AND Locations.Address = '3374 Sarina Manor'
    AND Tourist_Attractions.How_to_Get_There = 'bus'
    AND Photos.Name = 'game1'
    AND Photos.Filename = '702'

records.question: Which tourist attractions that have related attraction types, locations, street markets, and tourist attraction features have the name exactly 'exploration trial' and have street markets with market details exactly 'Broadway'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id FROM tourist_attractions
JOIN ref_attraction_types ON tourist_attractions.attraction_type_code = ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_code
JOIN locations ON tourist_attractions.location_id = locations.location_id
JOIN street_markets ON tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id = street_markets.market_id
JOIN tourist_attraction_features ON tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id = tourist_attraction_features.tourist_attraction_id
WHERE tourist_attractions.name = 'exploration trial' AND street_markets.market_details = 'Broadway'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT 
    ta.Tourist_Attraction_ID
FROM 
    Tourist_Attractions ta
INNER JOIN 
    Ref_Attraction_Types rat ON ta.Attraction_Type_Code = rat.Attraction_Type_Code
INNER JOIN 
    Locations l ON ta.Location_ID = l.Location_ID
INNER JOIN 
    Street_Markets sm ON ta.Tourist_Attraction_ID = sm.Market_ID
INNER JOIN 
    Tourist_Attraction_Features taf ON ta.Tourist_Attraction_ID = taf.Tourist_Attraction_ID
WHERE 
    ta.Name = 'exploration trial' AND sm.Market_Details = 'Broadway'

WHERE photos.name = 'din3' AND locations.address = '0692 Georgiana Pass' AND ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_description = 'museum' AND tourist_attractions.how_to_get_there = 'walk' AND tourist_attractions.name = 'history gallery' AND locations.location_name = 'The Boneyard' AND photos.filename = '864'
